title: Day 17 — Talent Growth Engine
guidingQuestion: How can we grow 5× faster without working 5× harder?
learningObjectives: Discover the capacity limits of the solo-advisor model
Shift from an Advisor Engine to a Growth Engine mindset
Set a bold 5× challenge to guide venture redesign
Redesign one stage of the Growth Engine Canvas for 5× impact
Understand leadership as the multiplier that scales the engine
